# Vellmont Services

> AI-first software studio building production tools for Indian SMBs and the industries that still run on humans, paper, and WhatsApp — clinics, astrologers, tour operators, tutors, freelancers, and event hosts. We rewire those workflows with AI. Six products shipped; custom AI builds available. Headquartered in Hyderabad, India with an office in Dubai, UAE.

## About

Vellmont was founded in 2025 to build the software that "long-tail" Indian businesses actually need — software that doesn't break, works on a ₹8,000 phone, takes payments via UPI, and speaks Hindi when needed. We do not chase the Fortune 500 or unicorn label; we build for the 7,000 tour operators in Rajasthan, the astrologer in Pune with 200 daily clients, and the tutor in Hyderabad with 40 students.

## Products

- [MedQuePMS](https://medquepms.vellmontservices.com): Clinic OS — queue management, doctor consultation, patient records, pharmacy CRM, and medical-representative scheduling. Patients book via WhatsApp, call, or IVR. Built for Indian clinics, doctors, and small hospitals.
- [Vedjyotix](https://vedjyotix.com): Astrology, numerology, gun-milan compatibility, and a verified astrologer marketplace where users book chat and video consultations. UPI payments.
- [Vellroute](https://vellroute.com): Tour operator management software — hotels, drivers, tourists, and multi-day itineraries in one screen. Auto-shares itineraries with tourists in multiple languages.
- [Tutora](https://tutorra.vellmontservices.com): Tutoring management platform where tutors and students register, fees are paid up front via UPI, classes run inside the app, and recordings are auto-shared. Subscription-based for tutors.
- [InviteSync](https://invitesync.com): Store every invitation you ever received — wedding, birthday, corporate — on web and mobile. Reminders included.
- [Vellbill](https://vellbill.com): GST-aware invoicing and expense management for Indian SMBs and freelancers. Supports random one-off invoices.

## Services

- Custom software development (web, mobile, AI, automation)
- Indian-market product builds (UPI, WhatsApp, IVR, regional language)
- Long-term product engineering partnerships

## Process

1. Argue with you until the brief is sharp enough to cut something
2. Build the working version first; prettify after
3. Ship in weeks, not quarters
4. Stick around — we don't build and ghost; we keep iterating with you
